top_signals.title: Bank of Japan to move ahead with a rate increase in June
top_signals.summary: Read the BoJ’s May forecast from the FT’s Monetary Policy Radar team
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Investor Angst Emerges in Riskiest Stocks on Rate Uncertainty
top_signals.summary: Investors are starting to hedge the risk of a drop in the Russell 2000 Index of smaller companies, despite investors remaining bullish on large-cap stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Irish Officials Told to Probe ‘Suspicious’ Polymarket Betting
top_signals.summary: Ireland’s Finance Minister Simon Harris has instructed officials to carry out an analysis of how the government should react to the uptick of “suspicious betting” on platforms like Polymarket.
